title: The Indira Gandhi National Open University Act, 1985
full_text: The Indira Gandhi National Open University Act, 1985 इन्‍दिरा गांधी राष्‍ट्रीय मुक्‍त विश्‍वविद्यालय अधिनियम, 1985 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 198550 Act Number: 50 Enactment Date: 1985-09-02 Act Year: 1985 Short Title: The Indira Gandhi National Open University Act, 1985 Hindi Title: इन्‍दिरा गांधी राष्‍ट्रीय मुक्‍त विश्‍वविद्यालय अधिनियम, 1985 Long Title: An Act to establish and incorporate an open University at the national level for the introduction and promotion of the open university and distance education systems in the educational pattern of the country and for the co-ordination and determination of standards in such systems. Ministry: Ministry of Education Department: Department of Higher Education Enforcement Date: 20-09-1985 Notification: 20th September, 1985, vide notification No. S.O. 678(E), dated 19th September, 1985, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
